svg.title: Views in SQL

text.data-narration: What is a View in SQL?

g.text: What is a View in SQL?

text.data-narration: A view in SQL is a virtual table that is based on the result of a query.

g.text: A view in SQL is a virtual table that is based on the result of a query.

text.data-narration: It is a stored query that can be used to retrieve data from one or more tables.

g.text: It is a stored query that can be used to retrieve data from one or more tables.

text.data-narration: Views are used to provide a layer of abstraction between the physical database and the users who interact with it.

g.text: Views are used to provide a layer of abstraction between the physical database and the users who interact with it.

text.data-narration: Improved Data Security: Views can be used to hide sensitive data from users who do not need to see it.

g.text: Improved Data Security: Views can be used to hide sensitive data from users who do not need to see it.

text.data-narration: Simplified Complex Queries: Views can be used to simplify complex queries and improve data consistency.

g.text: Simplified Complex Queries: Views can be used to simplify complex queries and improve data consistency.

text.data-narration: Data Abstraction: Views provide a layer of abstraction between the physical database and the users who interact with it.

g.text: Data Abstraction: Views provide a layer of abstraction between the physical database and the users who interact with it.

text.data-narration: Performance Overhead: Views can introduce performance overhead due to the additional processing required to create and maintain them.

g.text: Performance Overhead: Views can introduce performance overhead due to the additional processing required to create and maintain them.

text.data-narration: Data Inconsistency: Views can introduce data inconsistency if the underlying tables are modified.

g.text: Data Inconsistency: Views can introduce data inconsistency if the underlying tables are modified.

text.data-narration: Difficulty in Maintenance: Views can be difficult to maintain if the underlying tables are modified.

g.text: Difficulty in Maintenance: Views can be difficult to maintain if the underlying tables are modified.

text.data-narration: To create a view in SQL, the following syntax is used: CREATE VIEW view_name AS SELECT column1, column2, ...

g.text: To create a view in SQL, the following syntax is used: CREATE VIEW view_name AS SELECT column1, column2, ...
